ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_devices" (
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "coreid" TEXT /* Core identifier of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the monitoring device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the device */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the device */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the device */,
  "alt" REAL /* Altitude of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_object_id" TEXT /* ID of the data object being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device linked to the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., calibration, maintenance) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event occurrence */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the event has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_events_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES monitoring_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_object_id" TEXT /* ID of the data object being checked */,
  "check_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes regarding the check */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of any issues found during the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
